title: Bioengineering (English) Mission and Vision
content:
Bioengineering (English) Mission and Vision

Mission

Bioengineering is a profession that develops new materials, devices, processes, bioinformatics applications by looking at complex biological systems from an engineering perspective. Bioengineering is an engineering discipline where biology is the main focus, also supported by chemistry, microbiology, biochemistry, immunology, and pharmacology; therefore, it is a multidisciplinary department. Bioengineers apply the maximum efficiency in the most economical way for the biological processes and are responsible for bridging over-engineering applications such as mass transfer, heat transfer, fluid mechanics, thermodynamics, process control, biomechanical separation and purification techniques, and the above-mentioned branches of science such as biology, molecular biology, immunology, genetics, and chemistry.

Our main mission as the bioengineering department at our university is to train our students to bring together engineering and life sciences to create scientific discoveries and new technological inventions.

Vision

Our main vision as Üsküdar University Bioengineering Department is to contribute to developments in the field of bioengineering, be a leader in bioengineering, open new developments, and train bioengineers who are able to compete with their associates.
